name: Papaya Glow Face Wash
short: A paraben-free papaya face wash with glycerin that removes dirt and oil while leaving skin fresh, balanced, and glowing.
description: Papaya Glow is a daily face wash that harnesses the natural enzymes of papaya to gently dissolve impurities, dead skin, and excess oil. Glycerin draws in moisture to keep skin balanced and comfortable, while the rich-foam, easy-rinse formula makes cleansing a small daily pleasure. Paraben-free and gentle enough for all skin types, including sensitive. Skin feels fresh, clear, and softly glowing — never tight.
benefits: Papaya enzymes gently dissolve impurities and dead skin
Glycerin maintains skin's natural moisture balance
Paraben-free and suitable for all skin types
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Suitable for all skin types.

customerReviews.title: Refreshing & Gentle Face Wash for Daily Use
customerReviews.body: I’ve been using this papaya face wash for a while and really like it. It cleans the skin well by removing dirt and excess oil without making the face feel too dry. The fragrance is pleasant and refreshing, and the rich foam makes it easy to use. My skin feels fresh, soft, and clean after every wash. Also, it’s gentle on the skin and good for daily use. Overall, a nice budget-friendly face wash for maintaining fresh and glowing skin.

customerReviews.title: Great everyday face wash
customerReviews.body: I’ve got to say this…it’s a good everyday face wash if you’re looking for something simple and refreshing. It cleans well and leaves the skin feeling fresh without drying it out. The texture is nice, lathers easily, and you don’t need much product. So yeah, a 10/10 for me…does its job.

customerReviews.title: Refreshing And Affordable Face Wash
customerReviews.body: Good face wash for daily use. It removes dirt and excess oil effectively without making the skin too dry. The papaya fragrance is pleasant, and the glycerin helps keep skin soft and fresh after every wash. Affordable, travel-friendly, and suitable for normal to oily skin.

customerReviews.title: Good for daily use
customerReviews.body: Very refreshing and gentle face wash. My skin feels fresh, clean, and smooth after every use without any dryness. Good for daily use.

customerReviews.title: Good daily use facewash
customerReviews.body: Skin feels fresh ,it doesn't make the skin feel dry.

customerReviews.title: Great product, must buy.
customerReviews.body: I recently tried the Majeste Papaya Glow Face Wash, and it feels refreshing on the skin. The papaya-based formula helps remove dirt and excess oil effectively while leaving the face feeling clean and fresh. It creates a nice foam, rinses off easily, and doesn’t make the skin feel overly dry thanks to the glycerin content. The mild fruity fragrance is pleasant, and the packaging is compact and travel-friendly. Overall, it’s a good budget-friendly face wash for daily use, especially for oily or normal skin types.
